# Network Security Policy v2

Current network security policy for all company systems.

All network access must be logged and reviewed monthly by the IT security team.
VPN is required for all remote connections to company resources.

## Network Access Controls

- All access events logged and retained for 12 months
- Monthly review by IT security team
- VPN mandatory for all remote work
- Zero-trust principles applied to inter-service traffic
